subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the celestial Dominion of exalted glory, wherein calleth out the Youth, the Youth Who hath appeared in the presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من جبروت عز علیا و فیه ینادی الغلام غلام الذی حضر تلقاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
